column1: Higashiyama Craft Collective wood kiln. Loaded 14 May, lit 15 May 2026.
Stokers: M. Farmer, Mika Tanabe. Two more from the collective on rota.

column5: Lit. Slow warm to drive off damp.
Good ember bed. Ash starting to fly.
Cone 10 front down. Hold for ash build.
Cone 11 soft. Stop stoking, clam up.
Bricked the firebox. Let it fall. 78 hours total.

column1: Unload 21 May after slow cool. See firing log F-26-05 for results.
